summary: Workspaces scheduled for migration are unavailable during cutover window.

updates.details: Check the schedule to see dates for specific workspaces.

summary: Advance notice of next regular scheduled maintenance day

updates.details: Scheduled maintenance day Tuesday 14 July 2026: expect disruption to all CEDA & JASMIN services. Please plan your work accordingly.

summary: Longer wait times due to staff shortage

updates.details: Wait times for SSH access are currently longer than usual. We apologise for any inconvenience.
Issues following power outage on Thu 18th July resolved EXCEPT those listed on this status page.
Issue currently affecting /work/scratch-pw4 following power outage on Thu 18 July.
Issues with other PFS resolved EXCEPT for /work/scratch-pw4 which is still reconstructing.
Reconstruction of /work/scratch-pw4 in progress, expected to take a few more days. If you attempt to use this in your LOTUS job, it will timeout and fail. Please use /work/scratch-pw5 instead.

summary: JASMIN Cloud portal down in preparation for STFC Cloud downtime 6-10th July.

updates.details: JASMIN Azimuth Cloud Portal is now shutdown in preparation for STFC Cloud downtime 6-10th July.
